Varupa's Circle is constituted by the seven asterisms, RevatI,
Purva§adha, Ardra, Aslesa, Mula, Uttarabhadrapada and Satabhi-
saj. Its indications appearing a week before are the following ;
Huge clouds resembling blue lily, bees and collyrium in colour,
